fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the status of the production order.

fields.name: Prod. Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related production order.

fields.name: Routing No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the routing number.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number of the capacity need.
The program uses this field internally.

fields.name: Operation No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the operation number.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of capacity need. Here you can see whether this capacity need is for a machine center or a work center.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the Number of the machine center or work center depending on the entry in the Type field.

fields.name: Work Center No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the work center number of the capacity need. If this capacity need occurs at a machine center that is assigned to a work center, that work center number will be shown here. If the capacity need is for a work center, the No. field and this field will show the same number.

fields.name: Work Center Group Code
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the work center group.
Both Machine centers and Work centers can be assigned to work center groups.
If a machine center is assigned to a work center and that work center is assigned to a work center group, it is also displayed here.

fields.name: Routing Reference No.
fields.tooltip:
This field is used internally.

Refers to the routing number that is related to the production order line that causes the capacity need.
The field contains a zero when the routing line is related to a family order where more production order lines share the same routing.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the date on which this capacity need occurred.
Running the Refresh Production Order batch job will define the capacity need for the special dates and time.

fields.name: Starting Time
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the starting time of the capacity need.
Running the Refresh Production Order batch job from a production order will calculate the capacity need for the special dates and time. The program uses the starting time to determine an optimal load for a machine center or a work center. For example, if the first production order has a capacity need of 6 hours on a special machine center and the normal working time is 8 hours, planning will use the remaining 2 hours for another production order and will define a starting time in the afternoon.

fields.name: Ending Time
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the ending time of the capacity need.
Running the Refresh Production Order batch job from a production order will calculate the capacity need for the special dates and time. The program uses the ending time to determine an optimal load for a machine center or a work center. For example, if the first production order has a capacity need of 6 hours on a special machine center and the normal working time is 8 hours, planning will use the remaining 2 hours for another production order and will define an ending time in the afternoon.

fields.name: Allocated Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the capacity need of planned operations.

fields.name: Send-Ahead Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the send-ahead quantity is of type Input, Output, or Both.

fields.name: Time Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the time type of the capacity need. Two options are available: Setup Time and Run Time.

fields.name: Needed Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies how much time is required to meet the needs resulting from the specified capacity.

fields.name: Needed Time (ms)
fields.tooltip: Specifies how much time (in ms) is required to meet the needs resulting from the specified capacity.

fields.name: Lot Size
fields.tooltip: Specifies the lot size to which this capacity need refers.

fields.name: Concurrent Capacities
fields.tooltip: Specifies the concurrent capacity of the operation.

fields.name: Efficiency
fields.tooltip: Specifies the efficiency of the production order capacity need.

fields.name: Starting Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and the starting time, which are combined in a format called "starting date-time".

fields.name: Ending Date-Time
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date and the ending time, which are combined in a format called "ending date-time".

fields.name: Worksheet Template Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the template name of the subcontracting worksheet that holds this production order capacity need.

fields.name: Worksheet Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the batch name of the subcontracting worksheet that holds this production order capacity need.

fields.name: Worksheet Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line number of the subcontracting worksheet that holds this production order capacity need.

fields.name: Active
fields.tooltip:
This field is used internally.

This check box is selected if the production order with the capacity need is on the planning worksheet and has not been carried out.

fields.name: Requested Only
fields.tooltip:
This field is used internally.

This check box is selected if the production order with the capacity need is being replanned.
